text.*:
This page is about the item. For the goddess in Dota 2 lore, see Shiva (Goddess).
  • Item
  • Changelogs

Shiva's Guard is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Armor. However, it can only be completed with items from the Secret Shop.

Shiva's Guard
Said to have belonged to a goddess, today it retains much of its former power.
Armor
Cost 4500 (1350)
Sell Value 2250
Active Arctic Blast
Passive ? Freezing Aura
Bonus ? +17 Armor
+75 AoE Radius
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe


Additional Information

[edit]
  • This item is shown as a Team Item in the shop window when purchased by an ally.
  • Area of Effect bonuses from multiple Chasm Stones or its upgrades do not stack

Abilities

[edit]

Arctic Blast

[edit]
Arctic Blast
▶️
Ability
No
Affects
Enemies
Damage
Spell / Magical
Emits an expanding freezing wave that follows and covers an area around the caster, dealing damage and slowing movement speed of enemies as it reaches them.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Radius: 825
Damage: 260
Move Speed Slow: 40%
Slow Duration: 4
27
75
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Misc.
  • Show All
  • Does not interrupt the caster's channeling abilities upon cast. Exception: Tricks of the Trade.
  • modifier_item_shivas_guard_thinker
    • Arctic Blast is centered on the caster for the full duration.
    • The blast spreads at a speed of 400, taking 2.06 seconds to cover the whole radius.
    • Affects the entire area while expanding, the area of effect is not a ring.
  • Does not affects invulnerable units.
modifier_item_shivas_guard_thinker
On hidden entity
modifier_item_shivas_guard_blast
Arctic Blast: Movement speed slowed by x%.
  • Provides 800 radius flying vision, following the caster and leaving a trail of vision which lasts for 2 seconds.
  • Applies the effects in the following order:
    • The slow debuff
    • The spell damage.

Freezing Aura

[edit]
Freezing Aura
Ability
Passive / Aura
Affects
Enemies
Reduces the attack speed of nearby enemies.
Radius: 1200
Attack Speed Slow: 45
Aura Linger Duration: 0.5
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Misc.
  • Show All
  • Multiple instances of Freezing Aura do not stack.
  • Does not affect invulnerable or hidden enemies.
modifier_item_shivas_guard_aura
Freezing Aura: Attack speed reduced by x and regeneration by x%.
  • The status debuff icon on enemies only shows up when the affected unit has vision over the source.
    • However, the armor reduction in the HUD is always visible.

Recommended Heroes

[edit]

Tips

[edit]
  • Arctic Blast's effect hits every enemy once within its radius, even after its edge has expanded past the target. Because of its slow expansion time (taking about 2 seconds to reach max radius), it can be thought of as a moving area effect, centered on the hero.
    • Use Arctic Blast before blinking or engaging an enemy to instantly deal area damage and movement slow upon initiation.
    • This can be used to instantly disable enemy Blink Daggers by prematurely using Arctic Blast out of vision and then blinking onto an enemy.
  • A useful item against enemies with mana burn. It greatly increases a hero's mana pool, and its aura slows the number of mana burning attacks made against its owner.
  • Good against heroes and creeps with low attack speed, causing them to attack even slower.

Trivia

[edit]
  • The name "Shiva" is a reference to the Shiva of the Final Fantasy series, an elemental summon with the power of ice.
  • In Deadlock, the Cold Front item may be inspired by Shiva's Guard, both releasing a wave of frost around the caster upon cast that damages and slows enemies hit by it.
    • Its upgrade – Arctic Blast – shares the name with Shiva's Guard's active ability, Arctic Blast.

Recent Changes

[edit]
Main Article: Shiva's Guard/Changelogs
Version
Description
7.41
(2026-03-24)
  • REWORKED recipe and stats.
 OLD    Shiva's Guard  Recipe:  Veil of Discord ( 1725 ),  Platemail ( 1400 ),  Recipe ( 2050 )

Total cost: 5175 Strength bonus: 5 Agility bonus: 5 Intelligence bonus: 5 Health regeneration bonus: 5 Armor bonus: 15 

 NEW    Shiva's Guard  Recipe:  Platemail ( 1400 ),  Splintmail ( 950 ),  Chasm Stone ( 800 ),  Recipe ( 1350 )

Total cost: 4500 Armor bonus: 17 AoE Radius bonus: 75

  • Arctic Blast
    • Damage increased from 200 to 260.
    • Radius decreased from 900 to 825 (effective spell radius unchanged due to item's built-in Area of Effect bonus).
    • No longer increases damage taken from spells.
  • Freezing Aura
    • No longer reduces Health Restoration and Incoming Heal Amplification by 25%.
    • Now pierces debuff immunity.
7.40
(2025-12-15)
  • Arctic Blast no longer deals 1.5 times damage against illusions.
7.39
(2025-05-21)
  • Freezing Aura
    • Health Regen Manipulation, Lifesteal Manipulation, and Spell Lifesteal Manipulation are now replaced by Health Restoration Manipulation, combining all three into one mechanic.
    • Reduction value remains 25%.
